name: Yunnan luoping Zinc&Electricity Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yunnan luoping Zinc&Electricity Co.,Ltd. engages in mining and processing lead-zinc ores in China. The company processes zinc ingots, crude indium ingots, cadmium ingots, zinc sulfide concentrate, electrolytic zinc, electrolytic cadmium, lead concentrates, antimony concentrate, and silver concentrates, as well as ultrafine and oxide zinc powder. It is also involved in hydropower generation. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Luoping, China.
